subject: confusion
body:
IT has been two weeks, I tried to make clear that I
don't care about the apartments.. that there is no
benefit to me or us.....  I tried to explain that my
priorities are fun sex things,,, massage ,and other
pleasures.... YOu said I should be realistic,,, which
seems to mean, I have not done  what you ask,, and I
will continue not to do them.....   Almost every day I
need to ask,,, are you o.k.,,,,  sex, things....
pleasure fun... I am at a loss of what to do next... 
I still don't have an assistant to  help sarah ,, that
you can trvel with... .. I would appreciate you
telling me,, what you think we should do ,, If you are
clear with me.. THis is what I am willing to do.. or
not,, it will prevent harsh frustration.. YOu are the
most imnportant person to me.. I

__________________________________________________
